description_long: This is a grand piano with a classic, elegant design, featuring a large, curved body and a flat top lid. The exterior is finished in a deep black color, giving it a sleek and polished appearance. The keyboard consists of a full set of white and black keys, extending across the front of the instrument. The piano stands on three sturdy, rectangular legs, providing stable support for its substantial weight. No pedals or music stand are visible, and the lid is fully closed, concealing the strings and internal mechanisms. The overall form is iconic, making it suitable for concert halls, upscale urban venues, or public spaces.
description: A sleek black grand piano with a full keyboard, curved body, and three sturdy legs. The lid is fully closed, and no pedals or music stand are visible.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full keyboard and the straight front edge of the piano.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curved body and the length of the piano, with the keyboard partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the closed lid and the rounded back of the piano, with no keyboard visible.
description_view_3: Side view from the opposite end, showing the length and the straight side of the piano, with the keyboard edge visible.
attribute_keyboard_layout: Standard full keyboard with 88 keys, alternating white and black keys in a traditional arrangement.
